text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, Cascadia Code, monospace

text.tspan: # [0:00] Narration: "I run Claude Code every day. Here's the problem: it has full access to my
# filesystem, my API keys, my git credentials. If something goes wrong — good luck."
